steps.text: Semantic binding: Ad Delivery • Entity: Line Delivery
Chart-first view for the active scope

steps.expression: (() => { const panel = document.querySelector('.forge-report-builder__runtime-preview .forge-report-runtime-chart-panel'); const text = panel?.innerText || panel?.textContent || ''; return text.includes('Selected value:') && text.includes('Display'); })()

(() => { const button = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.forge-report-builder__runtime-preview .forge-report-runtime-chart-action')).find((entry) => ((entry.innerText || entry.textContent || '').trim() === 'Show channel details')); if (button) { button.click(); } })()

(() => { const panel = document.querySelector('.forge-report-builder__runtime-preview'); const text = panel?.innerText || panel?.textContent || ''; return text.includes('target://steward/performance/channel-detail') && text.includes('Display'); })()

(() => { const button = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.forge-report-builder__runtime-preview button')).find((entry) => ((entry.innerText || entry.textContent || '').trim() === 'Dismiss intent')); if (button) { button.click(); } })()

(() => { const panel = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.forge-report-runtime-chart-panel')).find((entry) => !entry.closest('.forge-report-builder__runtime-preview')); const text = panel?.innerText || panel?.textContent || ''; return text.includes('Selected value:') && text.includes('Display'); })()

(() => { const panel = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.forge-report-runtime-chart-panel')).find((entry) => !entry.closest('.forge-report-builder__runtime-preview')); const button = Array.from(panel?.querySelectorAll('.forge-report-runtime-chart-action') || []).find((entry) => ((entry.innerText || entry.textContent || '').trim() === 'Show channel details')); if (button) { button.click(); } })()
